overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character walking through an ancient Egyptian city at night. The character releases an eagle and explores canal-side walkways, courtyards, and village streets illuminated by torchlight.

events.description: character releases the eagle from their arm and it flies away into the night

agents.ego_description: walking along a canal-side path with an eagle perched on left arm, then releasing the bird to fly

entered.detail: calm waterway with vegetation and fallen logs along the edges
low stone wall separating walkway from the water
large stone building with columns and lit windows across the canal
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark blue night sky
burning torches mounted on walls providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a canal-side path at night, holding an eagle on their arm before releasing it. The stone railing separates the path from the water, where a large Egyptian temple building stands illuminated across the canal. Palm trees and torchlight frame the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with decorated columns and patterned rugs

events.description: enters a columned courtyard from the canal walkway
ascends stone stairs through a large gate archway

agents.ego_description: walking through an interior courtyard with ornate columns, passing seated individuals, and ascending through a stone gate

notable_agents.action: seated at a wooden table near the wall

entered.detail: stone columns with colorful painted bands and hieroglyphic details
decorative geometric rug covering the stone floor
large stone gateway with stairs leading up and through to the village

segments.scene_description: The character enters a sheltered courtyard featuring decorated columns and patterned carpets. After passing a seated NPC at a wooden table, the character ascends stairs through a large stone gate archway, transitioning from the enclosed courtyard toward the open village.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian village street with mud-brick buildings

events.description: exits the gate into an open village street with mud-brick buildings
passes under a wooden bridge connecting two buildings overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through village streets, observing surroundings and passing villagers sitting by fires and walking along the path

notable_agents.action: group of villagers sitting by a fire near a mud-brick building
villager walking in the same direction down the street

entered.detail: traditional Egyptian mud-brick houses with wooden balconies and awnings
unpaved sandy street winding through the village
wooden walkway connecting buildings overhead creating a covered passage
tall stone tower visible in the distance against the night sky
wooden racks with hanging fabrics or materials drying

segments.scene_description: Exiting the gate, the character explores an open village street lined with mud-brick buildings and dirt roads. Villagers sit by fires and walk along the path as the character passes under a wooden bridge connecting buildings. A stone tower rises in the distance, and drying racks line the sides of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene canal-side walkway into the heart of a bustling Egyptian village at night. It begins along a stone railing where the character releases an eagle into the air, with the warm glow of torchlight and a grand illuminated temple reflecting across the water. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open waterfront into a sheltered courtyard filled with decorated columns and patterned carpets, passing a seated figure before ascending stairs through a massive stone gate. The environment then opens up into a dusty village street lined with mud-brick buildings and drying racks, where the camera glides past villagers gathered around fires. Finally, the path leads under a wooden bridge and toward a distant stone tower, completing the transition from the quiet canal to the lived-in architecture of the settlement.
